title: humularia anceps
intro: Humularia anceps, also known as the "African Pygmy Periwinkle", is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues and skin infections. The herbal preparations of Humularia anceps include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
